title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial on building long-running AI agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for stateless event-driven systems. The tutorial demonstrates multi-agent delegation patterns where a coordinator agent delegates tasks to specialized sub-agents.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building long-running AI agents with the open source Agent Development Kit (ADK). It demonstrates the long-running agent pattern for stateless, event-driven systems and shows multi-agent delegation, in which a coordinator agent hands specialized tasks to sub-agents. The takeaway is a concrete pattern for structuring durable, event-driven agent workflows using ADK.
